actions.leaf_title: Add list-units CLI subcommand with domain grouping

revised.title: Add list-units subcommand touching only cli and units modules
revised.content:
Previous attempt sprawled to 8 files. Re-scoped: add the `list-units` subcommand that prints units grouped by domain, touching ONLY the subcommand module and its test. Do not rewrite the router or formatters; reuse the existing registry API as-is.

Files: unitconv/cli/list_units.py, tests/test_list_units.py

Acceptance criteria:
- `unitconv list-units` exits 0 and prints every registered domain
- units appear grouped under their domain header
- no changes outside the two named files

Test expectations: new tests/test_list_units.py covering the grouping and exit code

actions.rationale: Scope failure -> smaller explicit-files respec that reuses the registry instead of rewriting it.
